productDisplayName: Baggit Women Hero Brush Black Clutch
description: Toned down glam, with a special occasion twist, this baggit clutch is just right for an evening with the girls, or a surprise dinner. Match the metallic tones on this piece with your pumps and accessories. Dimensions: 11 cm x 30 cm Shiny fabric upper with a fold-over detail that acts as a flap Concealed magnetic button closure One main compartment with lining A zippered pocket and pouches inside One zippered pocket under the flap Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
